Package uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components

package uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components
Defines the structural components and domain model for NetBeans project mapping.

This package provides a hierarchical representation of a project's internal structure, bridging the gap between physical files and logical Java types. It employs a "Refined Project Model" that categorizes workspace elements into Java source groups, resource folders, and project nodes.

Core Architectural Features:

  • Hybrid Scanning: Uses the NetBeans ClassIndex for high-speed logical type discovery and physical filesystem walks for non-indexed resources (e.g., package-info.java, images).
  • Recursive Modeling: Implements a composite pattern via ProjectNode for hierarchical size calculation and Markdown rendering.
  • VCS Awareness: ProjectComponent integrates with the IDE's Node API to extract version control badges and status.
Author:
anahata
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project
    Provides a robust integration layer for NetBeans Project APIs, enabling programmatic management of the project lifecycle and environment within the ASI framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.actions
    NetBeans IDE actions for managing project context within AGI sessions.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.alerts
    Provides real-time diagnostic and alerting capabilities for NetBeans projects within the ASI framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context
    Provides a hierarchical context-injection layer for NetBeans projects.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    JavaPackage
    A domain object representing a logical Java package within a project.
    JavaSourceGroup
    A specialized container for a Java source group (e.g., src/main/java).
    ProjectComponent
    A leaf or branch node representing a physical file or a logical Java type.
    ProjectNode
    The abstract base class for all structural nodes in the project model.
    ProjectStructure
    The high-level orchestrator for the refined project structure model.
    ResourceFolder
    A domain object representing a physical directory containing project resources.
    ResourceSourceGroup
    A specialized container for a physical resource source group (e.g., src/main/resources).
